experiences.name: Burj Khalifa
experiences.description:
The Burj Khalifa is indisputably the tallest building in the world. It contains high-end homes, global companies, and of course, the swanky Armani Hotel. 
At a dizzying 828 meters high, it's truly a testament to human ingenuity. Only the 124th, 125th, and 148th floors are open to the public where you get exclusive views of the Dubai skyline, sandy beaches, and azure waters of the Arabian Gulf. 
As you can imagine, the views from this shining beacon of progress in a desert by the ocean come straight from your wildest dreams.

experiences.name: Museum of the Future
experiences.description:
The Museum of the Future is the first attraction of its kind. Built to transform the very perception of the future as we know it, the unique structure accommodates several immersive future environments that aim to position visitors in an empowering version of the future.
Home to unparalleled themes crafted by the world's leading designers, Museum of the Future explores the future of space travel and living, climate change and ecology, health, wellness, and spirituality amongst many others.
Rising 77 metres above the ground with an instantly iconic exterior, the Museum of the Future is located in the heart of Dubai, a prime location that's easy for everyone to reach.

experiences.name: Aquaventure World
experiences.description:
Aquaventure World (formerly Aquaventure Waterpark) in Dubai, UAE, features an exciting array of rides and waterslides. 
Plus, it's home to a variety of marine wildlife, with shark, ray, and dolphin encounters available for daredevils who like to swim on the wild side!

experiences.name: Dubai Frame
experiences.description:
The Dubai Frame is more than just an architectural landmark; it's a viewpoint that lets you see the city of Dubai from a height of 150 meters! This golden frame structure has a museum that offers a snapshot of Dubai's history, as well as its present. 
Moving to the top, you can look down through its glass-bottomed walkway for an adrenaline-inducing view. There, you will also find innovative projections that give a glimpse into what Dubai's future could look like.

experiences.name: Dinosaurs - The Immersive Odyssey Dubai
experiences.description: See life-sized dinosaur models and learn about prehistoric creatures. Enjoy interactive exhibits and educational displays.

experiences.name: Dubai Desert Safari
experiences.description:
Whatever makes your perfect Dubai desert safari, you've come to the right place. From camel rides, 4x4 dune-bashing experiences, and quad-biking excursions, to traditional cultural experiences and moonlit BBQs, there's plenty to choose from to make sure you get the best out of your adventure.
Every Dubai safari is different, with different inclusions and pacings to suit every traveler. If you're looking for high-octane trips into the sand then you'll find plenty of options including sandboarding and the famous dune bashing. For an enlightening experience, there are Dubai safari tours with henna face painting, oasis visits, and stargazing.
You can find all the prices, deals, inclusions, and other information about the best Dubai desert safaris on this page. All that's left is to do is jump on a camel or in a 4x4 and be on your way!

experiences.name: Dubai Sightseeing Cruises
experiences.description:
Looking to book a Dubai Marina Cruise? You've come to the right place. There are a whole host of options to make sure you get the most out of your Dubai Marina experience. Whether you're looking for a simple sightseeing tour of the marina or something a little more classy, you can book online quickly and easily. 
The best Dubai Marina tours will float past sights like the Ain Wheel, The Palm, Atlantis & Burj Al Arab, with options for narrated tours, lunch cruises, and more. For a memorable experience under the lights, there are dinner cruises with live music. You could choose a tour on a traditional dhow, or a totally untraditional yacht or speedboat! 
Whatever your preference, browse Dubai boat tour discounts, itineraries, and deals and secure your next adventure.

experiences.name: Sky Views Observatory
experiences.description: The Sky Walk Dubai is a steel structure between The Address' Sky View Towers in Dubai. The outside walking bridge is located on level 53 of the twin towers, and connects the two at almost 220 meters above ground. The Sky Walk Dubai is already a major attraction for adrenaline junkies.

experiences.name: Dubai Ice Rink
experiences.description: The Dubai Ice Rink is a state-of-the-art family attraction in Dubai featuring ice skating. Glide across the Olympic-sized ice rink where unlimited fun awaits skating enthusiasts.

experiences.name: Lost World Aquarium
experiences.description:
As part of Aquaventure World, The Lost World Aquarium expands Dubai’s only integrated marine and waterpark destination – featuring 105 record-breaking slides, one kilometre of private beach, and 26 marine experiences, including Dolphin Bay and Sea Lion Point. 
The aquarium features14 interactive and immersive themed rooms, 35 new species and 19 new habitats, now home to over 65,000 marine animals, a live mermaid show performed daily by an international team of underwater performers and educational and sustainability programs through interactive displays, behind-the-scenes tours, and the Atlantis Atlas Project.

experiences.name: Food & Drinks Dubai
experiences.description:
Dubai is the ultimate destination for foodies and travelers looking to indulge in world-class culinary experiences. 
Known for its diverse and vibrant food scene, where you can savor flavors from traditional Emirati cuisine to fusion dishes, from street food to fine dining, Dubai has it all. 
Whether you're looking for a romantic dinner for two, a fun night out with friends, or a family-friendly food adventure, this carefully curated selection of food tours, cooking classes, wine tastings, and much more, definitely has what you need.

experiences.name: The View at The Palm
experiences.description: Offering a glorious panoramic view of Palm Jumeirah, the Arabian Gulf, and beyond from an outdoor terrace and a premium lounge, The View on level 52 of the iconic Palm Tower is the ultimate vantage point to enjoy a drink and soak in the futuristic urban oasis of Dubai.

experiences.name: The Dubai Fountain
experiences.description:
The Dubai Fountain is the gushing centerpiece of the manmade 30-acre Burj Khalifa Lake, which draws crowds to the middle of Downtown Dubai. In its full glory, it's illuminated by 6,600 lights and enhanced by 25 different colored projectors.
The Dubai Fountain puts on a spectacular dance show of watery movements every day, during which streams reach up to 140 meters high, synched up to the sounds of music and flashing lights. It's one of the city's biggest tourist attractions!

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi Day Trips from Dubai
experiences.description: Abu Dhabi Day Trips from Dubai offer visitors the opportunity to explore the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. With a range of activities and attractions, visitors can experience the rich culture and history of the region, including the stunning Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, the Emirates Palace Hotel, and the Abu Dhabi Falcon Hospital. Other popular activities include visiting the Yas Island theme parks, taking a desert safari, or enjoying a leisurely stroll along the Corniche. With convenient transportation options and knowledgeable guides, visiting Abu Dhabi is a must-do for any traveler to the UAE.

experiences.name: At.mosphere Burj Khalifa
experiences.description: At.mosphere Burj Khalifa offers unparalleled dining on the 122nd floor of the world's tallest building. Enjoy stunning views of Dubai's skyline while savoring gourmet cuisine. Perfect for special occasions or a luxurious everyday treat.

experiences.name: La Perle by Dragone
experiences.description: With 130 cast and crew calling its unique custom-built environs home, La Perle Habtoor City is a unique entertainment space. This 1,300 seat theater, financed by Al Habtoor features a pool with 2.7 million liters of water, and that's just part of the show.

experiences.name: Loco Bear - The Ultimate Entertainment Hub
experiences.description: Play a variety of arcade games and win prizes. Enjoy live performances and interactive shows.

experiences.name: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo
experiences.description: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo is located in the Dubai Mall. It's the largest suspended aquarium in the world, housing thousands of marine creatures from over 140 species. It's also home to the largest collection of sand tiger sharks in the world.

experiences.name: AURA SKYPOOL Dubai
experiences.description: Swim in the world's highest 360° infinity pool while enjoying the city skyline. Relax on the sun deck with a drink in hand.

experiences.name: Ski Dubai
experiences.description:
Ski Dubai where you can enjoy winter sports in the blazing Arabian desert. The snow here is real – they cool the interior to -6°C at night and produce the snow overnight – every morning there's fresh powder! The result is a whole lot of fun (out of the sun).
You can try out bobsledding, tobogganing and the absurdly fun Giant Ball where you literally get inside a giant plastic ball and roll down a gentle slope. You'd never guess there's a wintery oasis tucked inside the Mall of the Emirates.

experiences.name: The Green Planet
experiences.description: The Green Planet is a stunning angular building in Dubai's City Walk. Inside, this standalone biodome is humid home to over 3,000 types of exotic flora and fauna. Escape the desert to wander among leafy trees, colorful birds and rushing water.

experiences.name: Dubai Dolphinarium
experiences.description: Journey through the world of dolphins, seals and other marine life at the Dubai Dolphinarium. Be entertained, while taking an educational look into the lives of these fascinating aquatic mammals through playful shows in a comfortable, fully air-conditioned marine facility.

experiences.name: OliOli® Children Museum
experiences.description: Engage in hands-on activities designed for children. Explore different themed galleries featuring interactive exhibits.

experiences.name: Dubai Butterfly Garden
experiences.description:
The Dubai Butterfly Garden is home to more than 15,000 butterflies, spanning over 45 majestic species. Come and visit the fluttery critters, all housed in ten custom-built, climate-controlled domes.
Conceptualized by the same team behind the stunning Dubai Miracle Garden – a massive oasis of floral beauty located right next door – Dubai Butterfly Garden promises a colorful oasis filled with nature’s most beautiful winged creatures. 
Spanning over 6,673 square meters of indoor and outdoor gardens, packed with thousands of colorful plants and flowers, the garden temperature stays a comfy 18-25 degrees all year-round. It’s a perfect climate-controlled environment for all – people, plants and butterflies.

experiences.name: XLine Dubai
experiences.description:
They don't do things by halves in Dubai, and that goes for ziplines too! Introducing the world's longest urban zipline, XLine Dubai Marina. Taking daredevils on the ride of their lives, this record-breaking thrill-ride is not for the faint of heart! Descend from a height of 170 meters and zoom through the hypermodern cityscape of Dubai, high above the world-famous marina below. You'll get a video and photos of your ride afterward. 
Take the leap, and supercharge your Dubai highlight reel with XLine Dubai Marina tickets.

experiences.name: Dubai Safari Park
experiences.description:
Stretching over 119 hectares, Dubai Safari Park cares for around 3,000 wild animals and has a theatre with seating for 1,000 that hosts numerous educational animal shows throughout the year. 
The reimagined Dubai Safari Park consists of five key attractions, including the African Village, Asian Village, Arabian Desert Safari, Explorer Village, and Adventure Valley. Come and visit one of the UAE's top wildlife experiences, with Dubai Safari Park tickets!

experiences.name: Ain Dubai
experiences.description:
Located at the heart of Bluewaters – the sophisticated island destination – Ain Dubai is the world's tallest observation wheel, standing at a whopping 250 meters.
Made up of 48 passenger cabins, the wheel can carry more than 1,750 visitors at once, and offers up unbeatable 360º views of Dubai's stunning architecture. You can take your pick between day, night, and sunset spins, but whatever time you choose, you're in for an incredible ride.
The location also serves as an entertainment venue if you're looking for somewhere special to celebrate.

experiences.name: Dubai Watersports
experiences.description:
With year-round warm weather and arguably one of the world's most famous skylines, there aren't many better places to hop on a jet ski than in Dubai. 
Get ready to rip the throttle, bounce over waves, and feel the spray of the Persian Gulf as you pull tight corners and impress your friends.

experiences.name: Riva Beach Club
experiences.description: Relax by the pool and enjoy a drink from the bar. Dine at the on-site restaurant and savor fresh seafood dishes.

experiences.name: IMG Worlds of Adventure
experiences.description: IMG Worlds of Adventure is Dubai's newest theme park. The attractions are themed on dinosaurs, superheroes, and cartoon characters. It's located within the City of Arabia, along Sheikh Mohammad Bin Zayed Road.

experiences.name: WiFi & SIM Cards Dubai
experiences.description:
Stay connected in Dubai with a variety of service products for your mobile devices. 
Gain access to WiFi as soon as you arrive – plan activities, make phone calls, and send text messages. 
Activate a digital SIM card on your smartphone and connect to Dubai's local network for easy communication and web surfing.

experiences.name: Wild Wadi Waterpark
experiences.description:
Wild Wadi is the waterpark of the 21st century. It features acres of aquatic adventures and thrilling rides that defy gravity: Jumeirah Sceirah builds anticipation before dropping you down at a near-vertical 70° angle (don’t worry, it does straighten out – eventually!) and WipeOut Flowrider is one of four artificial surf stations in the world (!)
It’s not all thrills though, there are plenty of ways to chill out.  Among others, relaxing wave pools and a lazy river where you just drift along.

experiences.name: Kidzania Dubai
experiences.description: Kidzania Dubai is a sprawling indoor playground designed for the little ones, and also for the parents looking for new ways to expel their children's energy in a fun way! Here kids can prepare for the working world via realistic setups that put them in over 40 different job roles. Kidzania Dubai is located in The Dubai Mall, in Downtown Dubai.

experiences.name: Topgolf Dubai
experiences.description: A whole lot of holes-in-one and a whole lot of holes-in-none. Topgolf Dubai promises great food, drinks and a heck of a good time. No age or experience is needed when you walk through these doors. Topgolf is everyone's game. Topgolf is a golf driving range game with electronically tracked golf balls and automatically scored drives, located in Dubai, UAE.

experiences.name: Dubai Helicopter Tours
experiences.description:
See the city of Dubai from a new angle with a helicopter tour of Dubai. 
Soar over this shimmering desert oasis with a helicopter ride at every price point. Fly above the Palm Islands, the Dubai Marina, Burj Khalifa, and Ain Dubai and see this incredible city from the air.

experiences.name: AYA Universe
experiences.description: Attend interactive exhibits and enjoy light displays. Explore 12 space zones where you can observe the stars, walk in the blooming gardens, and cross the infinite bridge over the river. Take photos with unique art installations.

experiences.name: LEGOLAND® Dubai
experiences.description: LEGOLAND® Dubai is a LEGO-based theme park for families, packed with interactive rides, waterslides, models and building experiences. LEGOLAND® Dubai is located on Sheikh Zayed Road, between Dubai and Abu Dhabi.

experiences.name: Motiongate
experiences.description: MOTIONGATE™ is Dubai's brand new film-themed park, with 27 adrenaline-charged rides, and 5 different zones that bring the silver screen to life.

experiences.name: Dubai City Tours
experiences.description:
The food, architecture, history, and culture of Dubai are all waiting for you with any one of these Dubai city tour options. 
Join a city tour to see the sparkling lights and the world's tallest skyscrapers of modern Dubai, or get a taste of the rich Emirati heritage that's still contained within the city's souks.
Beat the heat with a night tour of Dubai, or get onboard a whistle-stop bus tour before you go back to soaking up the sun.
Either way, you'll be able to find a ticket that suits you.

experiences.name: CÉ LA VI Dubai
experiences.description: A MICHELIN guide restaurant, CÉ LA VI Dubai offers contemporary Asian dining and world-class entertainment with exceptional hospitality and magnificent vistas of the glistening Dubai skyline. The landmark location is situated in the heart of Downtown Dubai and soars 220 meters above sea level, boasting one of the cities highest rooftops with a Restaurant, SkyBar, Club Lounge, and Pool Deck.

experiences.name: Dubai Garden Glow
experiences.description: Dubai Garden Glow is located in Zabeel Park in Dubai. This family-friendly venue invites travelers into a dazzling experience of lights and entertainment. See artistic light installations, educational activities and a live music show, all within the park's magical themed zones. No one will forget the Glow Park, an expansive artificial garden featuring more than a million energy-saving LED lights.

experiences.name: Dubai Hop-on Hop-off Tours
experiences.description: Explore the major cities of the world at your own pace with a hop-on hop-off option. With frequent departures and arrivals, an informal narrated tour available in several languages, and convenient transport highlighting all the hotspots, a hop-on hop-off tour is the perfect ticket for exploring a new city.

experiences.name: Dubai Skydive
experiences.description:
Experience the thrill of a lifetime with a skydive over Dubai! Get a bird's eye view of the vibrant cityscape as you soar through the sky. 
Prepare for an unforgettable experience with this thrilling activity – perfect for adventure seekers and adrenaline addicts alike. 
Take the plunge and feel the incredible rush of adrenaline as you descend from the clouds. Soar through the sky and create memories that will last a lifetime. Book your skydive today and take the plunge!

experiences.name: ARTE MUSEUM DUBAI
experiences.description: ARTE MUSEUM DUBAI is an immersive media art exhibition showcasing works that resonate with the natural landscapes and cultural backdrop of Dubai. This is complemented by a curated F&B space known as the ARTE TEA BAR, where visitors can enjoy a teahouse experience enriched with media art.

experiences.name: Grand Hyatt Dubai Waterpark
experiences.description: Spend the day on fun water slides and relaxing by the pool. Enjoy refreshments at the onsite snack bar.

experiences.name: iFly Dubai
experiences.description: iFly Dubai is an indoor skydiving experience in City Centre Mirdif Mall, a short distance from central Dubai.

experiences.name: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
experiences.description: The Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque is Abu Dhabi's most incredible religious building. It is located in Abu Dhabi, the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. It is also the largest mosque in the country, and the central place of worship for daily prayers, Friday gathering and Eid prayers.

experiences.name: Museum of Illusions Dubai
experiences.description: The Museum of Illusions in Dubai offers a host of Instagram-worthy moments, including mind-bending optical illusions and magic tricks you have to see to believe! The attraction is located near Dubai Creek.

experiences.name: Aquaventure World - Dolphin & Sea Lion Experiences
experiences.description: One of the most sophisticated dolphin habitats in the world, Aquaventure World is home to a pod of majestic bottlenose dolphins. Visitors can partake in up-close-and-personal encounters with the creatures, with swimming, hugging, and diving experiences available for dolphin lovers to enjoy.

experiences.name: Dubai City Cards
experiences.description:
There’s so much to do in Dubai, it's hard to know where to start! Luckily a Dubai city card takes care of your plans for you. 
Efficient, time-saving, and great value – a Dubai City card is your ticket to some of the best attractions in the UAE. 
Get ready to enjoy world-famous locations like Burj Khalifa, or take on experiences including desert safaris, waterparks, aquariums, and more.

experiences.name: Dubai Marina Cruises
experiences.description: The Dubai Marina is a man-made canal located on the city's modern side, near Jumeirah Beach. A cruise around Dubai's Marina offers a modern and cosmopolitan atmosphere, with a range of restaurants, cafes, waterfront dining, and a vibrant nightlife scene.

experiences.name: Queen Elizabeth 2 Hotel
experiences.description:
Join the Heritage Tour for a look into life aboard the Queen Elizabeth 2 during her sailing days. 
Discover British heritage through the ship's design, engineering, and maritime history that shaped this iconic vessel over five decades. 
Explore the QE2 and learn about the stories that have made her a part of history.

experiences.name: House of Hype
experiences.description: Attend exclusive events featuring top influencers. Shop for limited edition merchandise from popular brands.

experiences.name: Pac-Man Live Experience Dubai
experiences.description: Navigate through a maze filled with challenges and prizes. Engage in interactive games and activities designed for all ages.

experiences.name: LEGOLAND® Water Park
experiences.description: Dubai's new family attraction is filled with wet-and-wild brick-based thrills and spills. With over 20 Lego-themed rides and attractions, it's a day full of imaginative fun.

experiences.name: Dubai Parks and Resorts
experiences.description: Dubai Parks and Resorts create the thrills and spills at several theme parks in Dubai, located in different areas. Their parks include MOTIONGATE™ Dubai, Bollywood Parks Dubai, LEGOLAND® Dubai and LEGOLAND® Water Park.

experiences.name: Al Shindagha Museum
experiences.description:
The Al Shindagha Museum invites visitors to explore the innovation, resilience, and desire for progress which shaped the modern identity of Dubai. 
Learn the story of Dubai's traditional creek, delve into Dubai's history and relationship with the wider world, and discover the art of Emirati perfume-making.

experiences.name: Madame Tussauds Dubai
experiences.description: Meet more than 60 global celebrities at Madame Tussauds Dubai! Get up close with famous faces like Vin Diesel, Kylie Jenner, Audrey Hepburn, and more. You'll also find 16 brand new figures showcasing talent from the Middle East region.

experiences.name: Dinner In The Sky
experiences.description:
Dubai is synonymous with unusual. The city is home to some of the most unique structures and experiences. While there is no dearth of restaurants, especially the unusual ones, Dinner in the Sky is a dining experience like no other. Exactly as the name sounds, Dinner in the Sky is where you get to dine while floating 50 meters above the ground.
Dinner in the Sky is located in Sky Dive Dubai, where a table for 22 people is suspended in the air with the help of a crane. This unique restaurant serves lunch, dinner, and afternoon tea as well. While you enjoy the three-course meal served here, you get to check out the amazing attractions and landmarks of the city like the Palm Jumeirah, Burj Al Arab, Dubai Marina, etc.
Dinner in the Sky offers two lunch sessions and three dinner sessions, each lasting 90 minutes. During lunch and dinner, a starter, main course, and dessert are served; during the afternoon tea session, an array of savory and sweet snacks are served.

experiences.name: Airport Transfer Dubai
experiences.description:
Airport Transfer Dubai offers reliable transportation to and from Dubai International Airport. A fleet of modern vehicles ensures a comfortable journey with professional drivers who are punctual and knowledgeable, getting passengers to their destinations on time. With sedans, SUVs, and luxury cars, they cater to various group sizes. 
Safety is a priority, with adherence to regulations and comprehensive insurance coverage. Online booking is simple, guaranteeing a seamless experience. Exceptional customer service includes assistance with luggage and special requirements. Airport Transfers Dubai is the trusted choice for business or leisure travelers at Dubai International Airport.

experiences.name: Expo City Dubai
experiences.description:
Expo City Dubai is a futuristic urban development located in the heart of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. This ambitious project was specifically designed to host the World Expo 2020
Expo City Dubai features a stunning array of architectural marvels, including the iconic Al Wasl Plaza, which serves as the central hub of the site. The plaza is surrounded by intricately designed pavilions representing different countries and showcasing their unique cultures and innovations. These pavilions were constructed with cutting-edge technology and sustainable design principles.
While the World Expo has ended, Expo City Dubai continues to attract visitors and serve as a symbol of innovation, cultural exchange, and sustainable urban planning. It offers a glimpse into the future of cities and is a must-visit destination for those interested in modern architecture, technology, and international cooperation.

experiences.name: Dubai Gyrocopter Flight
experiences.description: Dubai Gyrocopter flights offer a unique way to see the city's landmarks from above. You'll get a chance to capture stunning aerial photos and enjoy the experience of gliding through the sky. It's a new perspective on Dubai's skyline that you won't forget.

experiences.name: Noble Life Camp
experiences.description: Enjoy an evening filled with adventures such as dune bashing, desert safari, camel, rides, and more.

experiences.name: Jumeirah Mosque
experiences.description:
The Jumeirah Mosque is the only mosque in Dubai open to non-Muslims. An Open Doors, Open Minds policy fosters understanding and friendship with other cultures. You’ll be able to appreciate the landmark building for its architecture and design, and learn about Islam and Emirati culture in a relaxed atmosphere.
Though it was built in 1976, Jumeirah Mosque is a beautiful and grand example of the traditional Fatimid building style. The building holds 1200 worshippers and yet retains an intimate atmosphere.

experiences.name: Dubai Mall
experiences.description: Part of the US $20 billion downtown Burj Khalifa development, the Dubai Mall is the largest shopping and entertainment destination in the world. It has 1,200 retail outlets, more than 160 food and beverage outlets, as well as a bunch of top-notch attractions like Dubai Aquarium, Dubai Ice Rink, SEGA Republic, and KidZania.

experiences.name: Play DXB at Dubai Mall
experiences.description:
Play DXB at Dubai Mall is the first ever (and therefore the world's largest) indoor virtual reality park. 
With 20 virtual reality experiences, you can shoot zombies, rob a bank, try parachuting and more. Play DXB at Dubai Mall is located in the Dubai Mall and is easy to reach by car or metro.

experiences.name: The Yellow Boats
experiences.description: The Yellow Boats is a sightseeing company based in Dubai, who operate water-bound tours and excursions along the coast of the Arabian Gulf. The company takes its name from the trademark vibrant yellow motorboats they rent out, and the equally vibrant uniforms that their staff wear. You can't miss them!

experiences.name: The Smash Room
experiences.description: The Smash Room is an experience center where visitors have the chance to unleash their anger and smash objects using weapons. It is located roughly 15 minutes' drive from the Mall of the Emirates in Dubai.

experiences.name: Riverland Dubai
experiences.description: Riverland™ Dubai is the gateway to Dubai Parks and Resorts. It's a themed, fun, dining and retail destination for the whole family. The best part? Visitors can access this part of Dubai Parks without a ticket!

experiences.name: Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai
experiences.description: The Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai is a luxurious and comfortable resting area, inviting you to relax and unwind before your flight. You'll find live cooking stations, free WiFi, a bar well-stocked with drinks, shower rooms, a playroom for the kids, and stylish Arabic-inspired decor, plus facilities for all types of travellers. Access to the Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai is the perfect way to unwind in an occasionally manic airport!

experiences.name: Dubai Gold Souk
experiences.description: They say all that glitters is not gold, but in Dubai it probably is! When you visit the city that's made a name for itself on luxury, you can bet that a visit to Dubai's Gold Souk is worth its weight in well... gold. The souk has more than 380 retailers, most of them dealing in jewelry, so if you're looking for a way to treat yourself, you're in the right place!

experiences.name: Al Khayma Heritage House
experiences.description: Al Khayma is a heritage restaurant that lets you indulge in Arabic culture. Alongside serving up traditional Arabic fare, guests can also enjoy some some Arabic traditions like henna tattoos, falconry, and the chance to try on some Emirati clothing.

experiences.name: Jebel Jais
experiences.description:
Jebel Jais is a mountain that crosses the borders of Oman and the United Arab Emirates. The mountain's peak of 1,934 meters is on the Oman side, with the UAE high-point reaching 1,892 meters.
The mountain is home to the epic Jebel Jais zipline, the longest zipline in the world (as accredited by Guinness World Records). This high-flying adventure is one of the main draws of Jebel Jais, which is located roughly two hours from Dubai.

experiences.name: Dino Park Dubai
experiences.description: Dino Park Dubai is the Middle East's very first Dinosaur Park. Full of life-like animatronics, it's as close as you can get to a real-life Jurassic Park, without any of the danger. With over 120 of these incredible models, as well as dino-themed rides and attractions, it's fun for all the family.

experiences.name: Al Marmoom Conservation Reserve
experiences.description:
The Al Marmoom Conservation Reserve – located in Dubai – is the United Arab Emirates' first unfenced desert reserve. 
If you’re looking for a desert adventure close to Dubai, then you’ll find it here. The reserve encompasses more than 99 acres of desert shrub land and 10 kilometres of lakes. There’s 39 species of plants, 26 identified species of reptiles, and nine of mammals. On top of that, the area also provides sanctuary for 19 endangered animal species, and flocks of 300-500 flamingos.

experiences.name: Atlantis The Palm
experiences.description: Dubai has never been afraid of being a little ostentatious and nothing says 'we're fabulous' like Atlantis The Palm. This iconic entertainment destination was literally pulled from the ocean, like the real Atlantis in reverse, and is comprised of two world-class resorts that pride themselves on extraordinary experiences. Discover a world of family fun across dining, entertainment, and wellness experiences.

experiences.name: Trampo Extreme Dubai
experiences.description:
Trampo Extreme is a trampoline park located in the Dubai Mall. The family-friendly parks have tons of trampolines, with a range of 16 different jump activities, making it the perfect place to jump-start energy levels and get moving.
Kids 3 years and above can master their trampoline flips, challenge themselves on climbing walls, dunk a basketball on the jump courts, play a dodgeball game, or dive in the foam pit – the options are endless!

experiences.name: 3D Blacklight Minigolf Dubai
experiences.description: 3D Blacklight Minigolf Dubai is a unique blacklight indoor Minigolf experience for the whole family! It's located in a convenient, air-conditioned setting, in the middle of Dubai Marina at JBR, Bahar Plaza Level.

experiences.name: Dubai Hot Air Balloon Tours
experiences.description:
Explore the breathtaking beauty of Dubai from up high with a hot air balloon tour! 
As you float above the city, you'll be able to take in Dubai's amazing views from a unique and unforgettable perspective. 
Witness the amazing architecture, the bustling streets, and the stunning desert landscape – it's an experience you won't soon forget!

experiences.name: East Coast Day Trips from Dubai
experiences.description:
Experience the best of Dubai's East Coast on an unforgettable day trip! 
Get ready for a day of adventure and fun. Explore this beautiful region's unique culture and history, with its stunning landscapes and vibrant local communities. 
See the amazing architecture, sample delicious local cuisine, and take in the breathtaking views. 
Whether you're looking for a relaxing day out or something a bit more lively, an East Coast day trip is sure to have something to satisfy everyone.

experiences.name: Deep Dive Dubai
experiences.description:
Don't miss the thrilling Deep Dive Dubai – a world of unique scuba, snorkelling and freediving opportunities at the NAS Sports Complex in Dubai. Inspired by the UAE’s rich pearl-diving heritage of the past, this is also the world’s deepest and largest underwater attraction! 
Take the plunge and explore an abandoned and flooded city that's yours to swim around at an incredible 60 meters underwater.
Created for both professional and beginner divers, Deep Dive Dubai allows novices to explore in the safety of a controlled diving environment. Filled with 14-million liters of warm water, it opens up new adventures for experienced divers and thrill-seekers who want to go deeper than usual pools allow.

experiences.name: The Storm
experiences.description: This indoor Storm Coaster in UAE promises unbelievable feelings you have never experienced before. It is a unique indoor roller coaster that makes an incredible vertical drop at a high speed and offers a blood-boiling ride with twists and turns. Storm Roller Coaster makes its way throughout the whole building of Dubai Hills Mall. The attraction is 670 meters long and includes a completely vertical launch. Riders can be pushed as high as 50m up into the building. It has a max speed of 41 kilometer per hour.

experiences.name: Escape Hunt Dubai
experiences.description: Escape Hunt Dubai is packed with mysteries and excitement, you and your teammates will leap into new worlds to complete ground-breaking missions. Work as a team to find clues, solve puzzles and complete challenges before the time runs out. This isn’t something you watch, it’s something you experience – right in the heart of the action.

experiences.name: Dubai Crocodile Park
experiences.description: Dubai Crocodile Park is an extraordinary facility that encompasses 20,000 sqm of land and water, serving as a home to more than 250 Nile crocodiles. With great attention to detail, it has crafted an exceptional environment to ensure the utmost comfort for these majestic creatures. Alongside this, it takes pride in presenting a specialized Crocodile Aquarium and an unparalleled Crocodile Museum that delve into the captivating realm of the Nile Crocodile, providing visitors with an immersive exploration of their natural history. Experience a captivating exhibition showcasing the natural environment of crocodiles, complete with lakes, waterfalls, islands, and sandbanks. Visitors can marvel at enormous Nile Crocodiles measuring 5 meters in length, offering multiple view points for observation. Discover an unparalleled museum dedicated to the evolution of crocodile and their remarkable adaptations that enabled them to survive the extinction of the dinosaurs. Immerse yourself in a distinctiv

experiences.name: The Dubai Balloon
experiences.description:
Soar to exhilarating heights of up to 300 meters, equivalent to a 100-story building, and bask in the feeling of being on top of the world. Be captivated by the breathtaking silhouette of Palm Jumeirah while immersing yourself in the awe-inspiring vistas of Dubai and its shimmering skyline. The Dubai Balloon At Atlantis isn't just an ordinary observation point; it's an unforgettable experience.
Located at the world-renowned entertainment hub, Atlantis, the Palm, and the record-breaking Aquaventure Waterpark, The Dubai Balloon offers a once-in-a-lifetime adventure. Whether you're with friends or bringing the whole family, this is a bucket list experience not to be missed. Kids under the age of three can join in on the fun, as they get to enjoy The Dubai Balloon for free, ensuring that cherished memories are made for all.

experiences.name: Alexandra Dhow Cruises Dubai
experiences.description: Established in 2008, Alexandra Dhow Cruises stands as a renowned floating restaurant in Dubai Marina, celebrated for its exceptional service. Discover Dubai Marina on a boat with a nice atmosphere, which could include a meal.

experiences.name: Boat Cruises Dubai Creek
experiences.description: Situated in old Dubai, near Deira and Bur Dubai, Dubai Creek has a rich history and has been the center of trade and commerce in Dubai for centuries. On a boat cruise, you can appreciate Dubai's natural saltwater creek, which separates the city into two main areas, Deira and Bur Dubai. Spot historical markets, souks, and historic buildings.

experiences.name: Dhow Cruises Dubai
experiences.description: Sail across Dubai in a dhow, which is a traditional wooden boat commonly used in the region and endowed with centuries of maritime history. As you cruise along Dubai Creek or Dubai Marina, you'll be treated to a scenic journey that showcases the city's rich history and futuristic skyline in perfect harmony.

experiences.name: Dubai Canal Cruises
experiences.description: Dubai's extensive network of canals connects Dubai Creek to the Arabian Gulf, and branches out to various neighborhoods, contributing to Dubai's efficient and picturesque waterway system. Pick a canal cruise that suits you, though whichever one you pick guarantees a scenic ride.

experiences.name: Dubai Cruises with Dinner
experiences.description: This selection of Dubai cruises with dinner offers unique dining experiences amidst the stunning backdrop of the city's skyline. As the sun sets over the Arabian Gulf, passengers can enjoy a meal while gently gliding along the tranquil waters. These cruises often feature a variety of international and local cuisines, music, and panoramic views.

experiences.name: Lotus Cruises Dubai
experiences.description: Cruising in Dubai is a luxurious experience that combines the beauty of the city's modern skyline with the serenity of its pristine waters. This selection includes cruises to Dubai Creek, and Dubai Marina, as well as intimate dinner cruises.

experiences.name: Yacht Trips Dubai
experiences.description: Cruising on a yacht in Dubai is a luxury and captivating experience that allows you to explore the city from a different perspective. As you set sail along the crystal-clear waters of the Arabian Gulf, you'll be treated to breathtaking views of Dubai's iconic landmarks, including the Burj Al Arab, Palm Jumeirah, and the stunning waterfront skyline. Yacht cruises in Dubai are known for their luxurious amenities, attentive crew, and a variety of packages, from intimate gatherings to extravagant parties.

experiences.name: Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
Welcome to Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi, the world’s first-ever Warner Bros. branded indoor theme park! As you set foot through the iconic Warner Bros. shield, prepare to be transported to the lands of your favorite characters for a one-of-a-kind immersive experience.
The excitement begins at the Warner Bros. Plaza, your portal to uniquely themed lands including Bedrock, Dynamite Gulch, Cartoon Junction, Gotham City, and Metropolis. Hungry for action and adventure or a dash of whimsical fun? Experience 29 exhilarating rides, interactive family-friendly attractions, and unique live entertainment for memories that will last a lifetime.
Don’t miss the chance to walk alongside some of the world’s most iconic characters, including Batman, Superman and Wonder Woman, and watch your childhood memories come to life as you meet Bugs Bunny, Scooby-Doo, Tom and Jerry, and your favorite modern stone-age family, The Flintstones.

experiences.name: Kai Beach Saadiyat
experiences.description:
Gaze at azure waters and the stunning sunsets from the comfort of our beach lounge chairs and freshen up before heading out for a delicious bite from a food truck by MLT.
Kai Beach Saadiyat is paradise wrapped in soft, white sands, lapped by warm turquoise waters and hidden in the heart of Saadiyat Island. Be transported you to a dreamlike atmosphere to rest, connect with yourself and have a perfect beach getaway. The 500-meter stretch of pristine shores is there to welcome you every day from 7am till sunset.

experiences.name: Ferrari World
experiences.description:
The world’s largest indoor theme park awaits and it’s devoted to the world’s most prestigious brand. You’ll speed through the park as you race to the thrilling rides.
The jewel in the crown is Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest rollercoaster. It accelerates to a speed of 240 km/h on the straightaways. And then there's the twists and turns... white-knuckle adrenaline-pounding excitement! Of course, you can also slow the pace down with a whole host of family-oriented attractions.

experiences.name: Yas Waterworld
experiences.description:
Yas Waterworld is home to 43 rides, five of them world firsts. It’s 37 acres of wet, watery fun and the best way to cool off in the sun. Adrenaline junkies are served by the likes of Bubble’s Barrel, a high-intensity, looping waterside, and they'll also find the world’s largest surfable wave sheet (gnarly, bro!).
Chill-seekers are also catered to, with plenty of soothing smooth rides like the lazily winding Al Rava River. So whatever level of intensity you want your water activities, you'll find it here at Yas Waterworld.

experiences.name: Louvre Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Saadiyat Island's latest addition is a true cultural powerhouse! A unique collaboration between the Parisian Louvre and the UAE government, the groundbreaking Louvre Abu Dhabi contains hundreds of priceless works by some of history's greatest artists.

experiences.name: Qasr Al Watan Palace
experiences.description: Qasr Al Watan Palace is part of the Presidential Palace complex in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Completed in 2017, this culturally significant landmark is open to the public and houses a beautiful Great Hall, various exhibitions of important Emirati artifacts, and a vast scholarly library.

experiences.name: Yas Island
experiences.description:
Yas Island is a premier destination offering a blend of entertainment, shopping, and leisure activities. It features attractions like theme parks, a waterpark, and the renowned Yas Marina Circuit, home to the Formula One Grand Prix. 
Visitors can also enjoy free activities such as strolling along the marina and relaxing at its scenic beaches.

experiences.name: Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
Discover the story of Earth through science, nature, and innovation at the Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi. 
Located in the Saadiyat Cultural District of Abu Dhabi, you can view a wide range of fossils and artifacts, and attend educational programs and workshops.

experiences.name: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi offers a chance to explore marine habitats and interact with its inhabitants, from dolphins and orcas to sea lions and tropical fish. It's a place that lets you appreciate the intelligence of these aquatic beings up-close. But it's not all about the fun; there's an important educational aspect too. SeaWorld Abu Dhabi is actually a hub where you can learn about how teams of marine experts and conservationists are working to safeguard the world's oceans and their inhabitants.

experiences.name: teamLab Phenomena Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Interact with digital art installations that respond to movement. Walk through immersive rooms filled with colorful projections.

experiences.name: Etihad Towers - Observation Deck at 300
experiences.description:
Etihad Towers is a complex of buildings with five towers in Abu Dhabi, the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. 
The towers are located opposite the Emirates Palace hotel and feature offices, apartments, and a hotel, the tallest of which is Tower 2, which stands at an impressive 305 meters tall.
On Level 74 of Tower 2 in the Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers, you'll find the highest observation deck in Abu Dhabi. This isn't just a spot for views; it's a sophisticated lounge and café. Here, you can relax in style and take in the city from above.

experiences.name: Mamsha Beach Saadiyat
experiences.description: Relax on the sandy shores and soak up the sun. Enjoy a refreshing swim in the clear waters.

experiences.name: Saadiyat Beach Club Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: The quality of the services along with the views offered by the club's magnificent position is the perfect introduction to its surroundings, legendary service, and top hospitality! Luxurious & exclusive in vibe, with a large pinch of lovely island charm, Saadiyat Beach Club is the kind of place where it is easy to just let the hours pass by.

experiences.name: Yas Marina Circuit
experiences.description:
The Yas Marina Circuit is one of the world’s most advanced Formula 1 circuits and the venue for the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix. It took a staggering 35 million hours to build!
Situated just 30 minutes from Abu Dhabi, it offers visitors the chance to step behind the scenes of the world of racing. The circuit has five grandstand areas – Main Grandstand, West Grandstand, North Grandstand, South Grandstand, and Marina Grandstand.

experiences.name: Qasr Al Hosn
experiences.description: Qasr Al Hosn is the oldest stone building in Abu Dhabi. Now a cultural history museum dedicated to preserving Emirati culture, it used to serve as the seat of government. The fort's stone defense tower was the first permanent structure in the now-capital of the UAE.

experiences.name: The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi is one of the largest aquariums in the Middle East, taking visitors on a spectacular journey through 10 cleverly themed zones, and immersing you beneath a frozen ocean, a flooded forest, hidden treasures in an Atlantic Cave, and lots more. The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi is home to 46,000 animals from the tropical waters of the Pacific and freshwaters of the Amazon, through to the frozen ice caps of the Arctic and the caves of the Mediterranean 
The aquarium houses more than 200 sharks and rays, representing 25 different species. All of the animals are obtained according to stringent guidelines and are cared for by a team of 80 sea life experts. A whole department is dedicated to education with a capacity to welcome 50,000 school children a year. The aquarium is easily accessible from Abu Dhabi island and adjacent to the neighboring five-star hotels, in a prime location for both residents and tourists.

experiences.name: Zayed National Museum
experiences.description: Explore exhibits on the history and culture of the UAE. View artifacts from ancient civilizations and modern times.

experiences.name: Emirates Park Zoo
experiences.description:
Meet white tigers, lions, and Siberian bears at the Emirates Park Zoo, home to more than 1,500 animals and 225 different species. 
Visit the huge variety of animals in different areas of the zoo, like Snake Alley, Giraffe Park, Primate Parade, Petting Zoo, Camel Farm, Mammal Cave, and many more.

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi City Tours
experiences.description:
Explore the vibrant city of Abu Dhabi with a city tour! 
From its modern skyline to its lively culture, Abu Dhabi offers something for everyone. A city tour offers a truly memorable experience where you can immerse yourself in the city's sights, sounds, and flavors.
Enjoy a guided tour of the city, learning about its history and culture while admiring its remarkable architecture or take the self-guided route. 
Whether you're looking for a day out or a weekend away, a city tour in Abu Dhabi adds to your amazing experience.

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi Desert Safari
experiences.description: Experience the thrill of a desert safari in Abu Dhabi! Explore the dunes of the Arabian Desert in a 4x4 and enjoy a true adventure, complete with a BBQ dinner and live entertainment. Take in the breathtaking scenery and marvel at the sunset - it's an unforgettable experience you'll never forget!

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi Sightseeing Cruises
experiences.description:
The best way to cool off from the intense Abu Dhabi sunshine? Take to the water in a sleek, modern speedboat and carve waves of cool ocean spray across the sparkling Arabian Gulf.
With expert skippers who can fill you in on the UAE's history, culture, and traditions, it's the easiest, breeziest way to brush up on the local history as you put sightseeing on cruise control.  
There are plenty of options available to suit a wide range of needs, with tours departing from lots of spots around Abu Dhabi.
Take a look at these awesome Abu Dhabi cruises, and see which one floats your boat!

experiences.name: SIM Cards Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
Discover Abu Dhabi with a sim card! Enjoy a fuss-free connection to the internet and make the most of your stay in the city. With these sim cards, you can stay connected to friends and family, while exploring the city. 
Get instant access to maps, phone numbers, and other essential information. Whether you’re a tourist or a local, these reliable sim cards are the perfect way to stay connected in Abu Dhabi. Get yours today and enjoy your stay with no worries!

experiences.name: Snow Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Snow Abu Dhabi extends a warm invitation to all those young at heart, as well as the youngsters, to come together and gear up for an incredible escapade in the snow. Embark on a delightful exploration of the Snowflake Garden, brace yourselves for exhilarating rides, and fasten your seatbelts for an immersive snowy adventure in our enchanting forest, and much more.

experiences.name: Yas Marina
experiences.description: Yas Marina is a port for local boat tours, as well as the site of the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, a prominent race on the Formula 1 championship calendar. It is located on Yas Island, about 30 minutes from Abu Dhabi city center.

experiences.name: KidZania Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Let the kids loose in a 55,000 square foot scaled replica of a real city, where learning and fun are rolled into one! KidZania Abu Dhabi tickets get you into a huge world of adventure, where learning and entertainment combine perfectly. KidZania is home to lots of immersive fun and more than 40 role-playing activities for children aged 4-16. It's a great place for developing life skills that simply cannot be taught in the classroom.

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi Water Sports
experiences.description:
Discover all that Abu Dhabi has to offer and chase your thrills with water sports! 
Whether you're a beginner or an advanced water sports enthusiast, Abu Dhabi has something to offer. You'll find a range of exciting activities to enjoy on the crystal-clear waters,
With beautiful views and warm sunshine, Abu Dhabi is the perfect destination for a water sports adventure. Come and experience the buzz of Abu Dhabi's water sports scene for yourself!

experiences.name: Pixoul Gaming
experiences.description:
Pixoul Gaming features world-class eSports and Virtual Reality games in one single gaming complex. Visitors will have the chance to immerse themselves in online gaming through the latest technology from a variety of virtual reality simulators.
Pixoul will also include the first-ever certified eSport academy in the region with the mission of highlighting the importance of playing responsibly.

experiences.name: Velocity Slide Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
Velocity is the longest and tallest stainless-steel slide in the Middle East and it’s located at WTC Mall.
The two stainless steel slides stretch from the top level of the mall to the bottom, with twists and turns that tempt you to take the plunge. 
Velocity’s slides are 68-metres and 54-metres long and have a sliding speed of two to three meters per second. The megastructure has a transparent section to give you a view of the mall as you slide.

experiences.name: Jubail Mangrove Park
experiences.description: Take a trip to Jubail Mangrove Park, the first of its kind in Abu Dhabi. You'll find a sanctuary for birds and marine life native to the region. This spot serves as an educational platform about mangrove habitats, important for Abu Dhabi's coastline protection and biodiversity support.

experiences.name: Adrenark Adventure
experiences.description: Welcome to Adrenark, the biggest indoor park in the area! It's a place for everyone - kids, teenagers, and adults to enjoy a bit of fun and a dash of friendly competition. Challenge yourself with exciting activities, test your gaming skills or indulge in everyday treats at the food court.

experiences.name: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque Tours from Dubai
Dubai Day Trips from Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
You might want to take a day trip to Dubai from Abu Dhabi to experience its world-famous landmarks like the Burj Khalifa and the Dubai Mall. 
The city offers unique attractions such as indoor skiing at Ski Dubai and the Dubai Fountain's light and water show. 
Additionally, you can enjoy different culinary experiences with a wide variety of international cuisine.

experiences.name: Al Ain Day Trips from Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Discover the cultural and historical treasures of Al Ain on a day trip from Abu Dhabi. Explore the lush Al Ain Oasis, visit the Al Jahili Fort, and experience the vibrant local markets.

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi Hop-on Hop-off Tours
experiences.description: Explore Abu Dhabi at your own pace, visiting top attractions like the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Emirates Palace, and the Louvre Abu Dhabi. A flexible tour allows you to see the city's highlights without the hassle of navigating on your own.

experiences.name: The Butterfly Gardens Abu Dhabi
experiences.description: Observe numerous species of butterflies in their natural habitat. Walk through beautifully landscaped gardens filled with colorful flowers.

experiences.name: Al Noor Island
experiences.description: Walk across the bridge and enjoy the views. Visit the butterfly house and see different species.

experiences.name: Pearls Kingdom Waterpark
experiences.description:
Discover a world where daring pirates, elusive treasures, mystical carpets, opulent palaces, and hidden galaxies await. Welcome to Pearl's Kingdom, a family-friendly destination filled with magic and excitement.
Ranked as the 7th best water park in the world, this premier venue features over 30 aquatic rides and slides, ensuring fun for all ages.
Located in Sharjah, known for its historical significance and vibrant culture, Pearl's Kingdom is just a 20-minute drive from both Dubai and Sharjah Airports, making it an easily accessible escape.

experiences.name: Central Souq
experiences.description: The Central Souq in Sharjah was built in 1978. It's such an iconic feature of the UAE that they put it on the Dh5 note! It's located between King Faisal Road and Khalid Lagoon.

experiences.name: Sharjah Fort
experiences.description: Sharjah Fort is a historic fortification in the center of Sharjah, in the United Arab Emirates. The fort was partially destroyed during the 1970s, but has since been faithfully restored.

experiences.name: Day Trips from Sharjah
experiences.description:
A day trip from Sharjah offers you a chance to visit bustling markets and the nearby coastline. 
You can explore the Sharjah Aquarium to see marine life up close. For a bit of history, the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization provides fascinating exhibits and artifacts.

experiences.name: Sharjah Desert Safari
experiences.description: Sharjah Desert Safari is an opportunity for you to step away from the hustle and bustle of city life and experience the tranquility of the desert. You'll get a chance to see wildlife in their natural habitat, ride a camel, and sleep under the stars in a traditional Bedouin tent. The desert's silence

experiences.name: Sharjah Hop-on Hop-off Tours
experiences.description: Visit famous landmarks and historical sites. Enjoy the convenience of a flexible schedule to explore the city's attractions at your own pace.

experiences.name: Sharjah Boat Tours
experiences.description: Take a boat ride along the coast and view the city skyline from the water. Spot various marine life and enjoy the coastal scenery.

experiences.name: Island Of Legends
experiences.description: Visit historical sites and learn about the local culture. Enjoy water activities like snorkeling and sailing.

experiences.name: Outdoor Activities in Sharjah
experiences.description: Visit the natural reserves and observe diverse bird species. Ride a bike along the coastal paths and enjoy the amazing views.

experiences.name: Sagrada Familia
experiences.description:
The Sagrada Familia is the magnum opus of the famous Catalan architect Antoni Gaudí. The cathedral was the finale of his incredible Modernist career and has been under continuous construction since 1882. 
Over time, the so-called 'architect of God' dropped all his other work so that he could focus exclusively on this project, which he did until his untimely death in 1926.
The Sagrada Familia is due to be finished in 2026, on the 100th anniversary of Gaudí's death. By that time, the construction of the Sagrada Familia will have taken 144 years.

experiences.name: Park Güell
experiences.description: Park Güell is Gaudí's fantasy-fuelled park in Carmel Hill, Barcelona. Walk amongst fantastic creations built in Gaudí's special brand of Catalan Modernism and enjoy panoramic views of Barcelona.

experiences.name: Casa Batlló
experiences.description: Gaudí's masterpiece, Casa Batlló located in the heart of Barcelona, was built in 1877. In 1904, the wealthy Batlló family asked Gaudí to build another in its place. Instead, he decided to renovate the building and did so in his own inimitable style. With a wavy animalistic facade, brilliant colors, and thought-provoking whimsical features everywhere (check out the roof terrace), this is a Gaudí wonder.

experiences.name: Barcelona Hop-on Hop-off Tours
experiences.description:
Ditch the walking tours and set itineraries and explore Barcelona your way with these city bus tour selections. 
Get to know Barcelona the easy way with a convenient hop-on hop-off bus tour around the city. See Barcelona's best sights at your own pace with guided narration in multiple languages onboard. 
Speed over to Sagrada Familia, cruise to Casa Mila, and check out Plaça de Catalunya (and so much more) all on the same day with a hop-on hop-off option.
Looking to beat the heat (and the crowds)? Opt for a night bus tour around Barcelona to see the city in a different light. Or, pick your own route with a public transport card (and save your soles).

experiences.name: Montjuïc Cable Car
experiences.description:
Enjoy panoramic views of Barcelona by taking a recently-refurbished Montjuïc cable car to Parc Montjuïc. 
This 750-meter-long cable car connects Barcelona to the top of a mountain, where you'll have the very best views of the Catalan capital and the beach below.

experiences.name: Casa Milà - La Pedrera
experiences.description:
Another masterpiece by Gaudí built from 1905-10, commissioned by the wealthy Pere Milà. This building was designed to be used as a fashionable home for the Milà family and as an office block.
The house's original name was Casa Milà; however, the building is better known by its name "La Pedrera" (The Quarry), which refers to the uneven gray stone facade that ripples around the corner of Carrer de Provença.

experiences.name: Barcelona Self-Guided Tours
experiences.description:
Embark on an unforgettable journey through Barcelona with Barcelona Self-Guided Tours. Discover the enchanting beauty and rich history of this vibrant city at your own pace. 
Our self-guided tours offer the freedom to explore Barcelona's iconic landmarks, hidden gems, and local treasures. Immerse yourself in the captivating architecture of Gaudí, wander through charming neighborhoods, savor delicious cuisine, and soak up the Mediterranean vibes. 
With Barcelona Self-Guided Tours, you have the flexibility to create your own itinerary and delve into the heart and soul of Barcelona. Start your adventure today!

experiences.name: Barcelona Aquarium
experiences.description:
A world-class aquarium located in the heart of Barcelona, Spain, showcasing a stunning collection of marine life from around the world. 
With over 11,000 animals representing 450 species, visitors can explore a variety of exhibits, including a tropical ocean tank, a Mediterranean reef display, and a shark tunnel. 
The aquarium offers educational programs, interactive exhibits, and conservation initiatives to raise awareness about protecting our oceans.

experiences.name: Spotify Camp Nou & FC Barcelona Museum
experiences.description: Tour the Spotify Camp Nou stadium and the amazing  FC Barcelona Museum. Immersive and impressive, the museum features giant touch screens, sound installations (including match-day sounds), historical stats, and a trophy cabinet worthy of King Midas!

experiences.name: Barcelona Airport Transfer
experiences.description: Ride to your hotel or other destination from Barcelona Airport. Enjoy a hassle-free transfer experience with professional services and drivers.

experiences.name: Barcelona: Public Transport Tickets
experiences.description:
Explore the amazing city of Barcelona with ease and convenience using the public transport system. With a vast range of buses, trams, and metro lines, you'll be able to get to all the incredible attractions, destinations and neighborhoods that make Barcelona such a unique city. 
Visit the beach, explore the historic city center, and take a day trip out of town. Buy your tickets today and explore Barcelona like a local.

experiences.name: Barcelona Zoo
experiences.description: Barcelona Zoo is a place where you can meet animals from around the world in carefully designed habitats. Whether it's monkeys in the trees or fish in underwater tanks, there's plenty to see. The zoo also provides play areas for kids, complete with an array of activities that promote learning about animals. Alongside all the fun, the zoo is also deeply involved in international conservation projects, offering a chance for you to learn about these important efforts.

experiences.name: PortAventura World
experiences.description:
PortAventura World is a family-friendly entertainment resort that includes three spectacular parks: PortAventura Park, Ferrari Land, and Caribe Aquatic Park. 
Ride one (or all) of 40 roller coasters at PortAventura Park, speed around the racetrack at the F1-themed park in Europe at Ferrari Land, and cool down during the Spanish summer with dozens of water rides at Caribe Aquatic Park.

experiences.name: Casa Vicens
experiences.description: See the beginning of Antoni Gaudí's incredible architectural legacy at this immaculately designed summer house in the heart of Barcelona.

experiences.name: Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau
experiences.description:
Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau is the masterpiece of architect Lluís Domènech i Montaner, an avant-garde of the Catalan Modernisme movement. In the early 1900s, he envisioned a hospital that would not just heal the bodies of patients, but also their spirits.
The resulting Sant Pau Hospital is an Art Nouveau complex boasting 16 pavilions, tranquil gardens, mosaic art, domed ceilings, playful pastel walls, and polychromatic tiles. The building feels less like a hospital and more like a surreal place of healing. Underground tunnels that connect the individual buildings are also open to visitors.

experiences.name: Barcelona City Cards
experiences.description:
There’s not many places that have been so molded by one man in the way Antoni Gaudí sculpted the architecture of Barcelona. 
A Barcelona city card secures your spot at famous venues while also sparing you from the long lines at Sagrada Familia and Park Güell.
This quick and convenient solutions allow you to see the best of his architecture, inside and out, while also giving you a number of other perks – access to public transport to shuttle you around the city and discounted entry to top art museums, like the Museu Picasso of Barcelona, are often included in a city card.

experiences.name: Palau de la Música Catalana
experiences.description: The Palau de la Música Catalana is a luxurious Catalan Art Nouveau masterpiece. Built between 1905 and 1908, the building unites the decorative arts of sculpture, mosaic, stained glass, and ironwork. Surprisingly it wasn't designed by Gaudí! It was dreamed up by another Catalan architect, Lluís Domènech i Montaner. The Palau was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997.

experiences.name: Palau Martorell
experiences.description:
Palau Martorell is an exhibition center in the heart of Barcelona's cultural scene. It showcases works by famous artists like Chagall, Alphonse Mucha, and Sorolla. Future exhibitions will feature Calder, Basquiat, and Tamara de Lempicka. 
The venue hosts international exhibitions, family activities, contemporary artist programs, and various lectures and conferences.

experiences.name: Montserrat Day Trips from Barcelona
experiences.description: Montserrat Day Trips from Barcelona offer a unique opportunity to explore the stunning natural beauty of Montserrat Mountain and its famous Benedictine monastery. Visitors can enjoy breathtaking views of the Catalan countryside, visit the Black Madonna, and listen to the world-renowned Escolania boys' choir. The traditional trip usually includes transportation, a guided tour, and free time to explore the area. It is a perfect way to escape the city and experience the rich cultural heritage of Catalonia.

experiences.name: Moco Museum Barcelona
experiences.description: View contemporary and modern art collections. Explore digital art installations and interactive exhibits.

experiences.name: Barcelona Boat Trips
experiences.description:
Explore Barcelona's stunning coastline and take in the city's iconic skyline on a boat trip. 
See the city from the sea and pass by some of Barcelona's most iconic landmarks on a leisurely cruise with breathtaking views.
With a Barcelona boat trip, you'll get to experience the Catalan capital's beauty like never before. Don't miss out on an incredible sightseeing opportunity!

experiences.name: IDEAL Montjuïc
experiences.description:
IDEAL Montjuïc is focused on immersive exhibitions and digital culture. The venue features large projection spaces, virtual reality experiences, and interactive installations.
Visitors can explore exhibitions that combine art, technology, and storytelling in an engaging and accessible way.

experiences.name: Tibidabo Amusement Park
experiences.description: Ride the Ferris wheel and get a view of the city. Enjoy the vintage carousels and classic amusement park rides.

experiences.name: Barcelona Cable Car (Port Cable Car)
experiences.description:
If you're really looking to elevate your Barcelona adventure, look no further than the Barcelona Port Cable Car. This aerial tramway soars high above the 'Modernisme' architecture and bustling streets of the Catalan capital, providing a splendid bird's-eye view of the city. 
The Port Cable Car crosses the historic harbor of Port Vell and connects the Montjuïc hill with the seaside suburb of Barceloneta. It's not to be confused with the Montjuïc Cable Car, which links the upper terminus of the Montjuïc funicular with Montjuïc Castle.

experiences.name: La Roca Village Transfers from Barcelona
experiences.description: La Roca Village is a boutique outlet shopping village, located just 40 min from Barcelona city centre. Featuring a dizzying array of designer brand outlets and amazing prices all-year-round, La Roca Village provides a perfect mix of retail therapy for fashionistas and savvy bargain hunters alike. The tranquil tree-lined setting and slew of trendy cafes and restaurants also make it an ideal place to chill for an afternoon while you shop till you drop!

experiences.name: Poble Espanyol
experiences.description:
Poble Espanyol is a museum that feels like an actual village. Built in 1929 for a world exhibition, it’s a lifesize replica of a Spanish town that features building styles from all regions of Spain. There are 117 buildings in total, and today these make up a beautiful cluster of restaurants and workshops that reflect the many diverse lifestyles, cuisines, and cultures of traditional Spain.
Take a nice stroll through, have some tapas and peruse the Spanish arts and crafts shops.

experiences.name: Palau Güell (Güell Palace)
experiences.description:
Palau Güell was one of the first important commissions Antoni Gaudí received at the start of his career. Eusebi Güell (industrialist, politician, and patron of the arts) wanted Gaudí to build him this peculiar urban palace as an extension of the family home on La Rambla. 
Today, you can book Palau Güell tickets online and visit a palace that's considered one of the masterpieces of the city's architectural landscape.

experiences.name: Fundació Joan Miró
experiences.description:
The hometown museum of one of the 20th century's greatest artists is the outcome of a friendship between two extraordinary creative personalities: Joan Miró, and his friend, the architect Josep Lluís Sert. The Fundació Joan Miró not only houses the single greatest collection of his work – the unconventional building is considered one of the most outstanding museum buildings in the world.
Once you step inside, you’ll discover the paintings, sculptures, some textiles and drawings. There are thousands of items here and you’ll be able to pick out the artistic evolution of the artist.

experiences.name: Barcelona Cathedral
experiences.description: With its intricate Gothic façade and rich history dating back to the 13th century, this awe-inspiring cathedral is a symbol of Catalan heritage and religious devotion.

experiences.name: Museu Marítim de Barcelona
experiences.description: View historic ships and maritime artifacts. Learn about the region's naval history through interactive exhibits.

experiences.name: Illa Fantasia Waterpark
experiences.description:
Make a splash at Illa Fantasia Waterpark – one of the best places for watery family fun in Spain. The park has more than 22 action-packed water rides guaranteed to beat the boredom (and the heat).
Illa Fantasia Waterpark is within easy reach of Barcelona by train or car.

experiences.name: Montserrat Mountain
experiences.description: Hike through scenic trails and enjoy the natural landscapes. Visit the monastery and explore its historical significance.

experiences.name: Gaudí Experience
experiences.description:
The Gaudí Experience is one of Barcelona's top attractions, giving visitors the chance to get acquainted with the Modernist architect's work in a 4D experience and exhibition. 
Located close to the iconic Park Güell, this interactive journey is also close to the Lesseps metro stop.

experiences.name: Museu Nacional d’Art de Catalunya
experiences.description:
The Museu Nacional D’art de Catalunya is the home of the world’s finest collection of Romanesque mural paintings and lots more by the greats, including Gaudi! 
The museum is located in Barcelona and is easy to reach by subway.

experiences.name: Mies van der Rohe Pavilion
experiences.description:
The Mies van der Rohe Pavilion, a symbolic work of the Modern movement, was designed by Ludwig Mies van der Rohe and Lilly Reich as Germany's national pavilion for the 1929 Barcelona International Exposition. 
After the exhibition closed, the Pavilion was dismantled in 1930. Over time, it became a key reference for Mies van der Rohe's trajectory and for the architecture of the 20th century as a whole.

experiences.name: Flamenco Barcelona City Hall Theater
experiences.description:
Flamenco Theatre, City Hall Barcelona has been recognized by UNESCO as a World Heritage site since 2010 and has also, for the fourth consecutive year, won the Travelers Choice award, making it among the 10% of the best attractions in the world. 
Dedicated to introducing the art form of Flamenco to those less acquainted with it, spreading the passion of the local dance, and hosting an array of talented performers, singers, and musicians, the Flamenco Theatre City Hall in Barcelona is the perfect place to go for an authentic Flamenco show.

experiences.name: Montserrat Cable Car Station
experiences.description: Ready to get the most awe-inspiring mountain views ever? The Montserrat Cable Car Station in Barcelona, Spain, entered into service in 1930, and is still the starting point of the mountain's dedicated cable car. Once you've flashed your ticket, board at the station and take the swift skyward journey towards the popular Santa Maria de Montserrat Abbey.

experiences.name: Tibidabo Panorama Area
experiences.description:
Visit the Tibidabo Panoramic Area, the highest part of the Park, offering free access and the best views of Barcelona. Situated 500 meters above sea level, you can take in the cityscape and get the best views of its iconic attractions and restaurants.
The Panoramic Area is open every day and can be reached with the Cuca de Llum (from Plaça Doctor Andreu). Tibidabo is the highest peak in the Serra de Collserola Natural Park, providing one of the best viewpoints to admire the city.

experiences.name: Paradox Museum Barcelona
experiences.description:
With more than 70 amazing exhibitions inspired by paradoxes, Paradox Museum Barcelona is the perfect place to experiment with all the senses, which invites you to ask questions about the world around us, to see reality through altered perceptions and to discover fascinating scientific concepts. 
Follow the signs and discover the exhibits in a space designed to discover them in a one-way flow. Take amazing photos and videos, enjoy the descriptions of the exhibits that explain “what to do” and “what's going on”.
Scan the QR codes to learn even more and feel free to ask questions of the team members. They can even take group photos of you. Before returning to reality, visit the Paradox Boutique for a unique souvenir.

experiences.name: House of Candy Immersive Experience Barcelona
experiences.description: Find a wide variety of candies and sweets. Taste different flavors and enjoy the colorful displays.

experiences.name: Tibidabo Funicular
experiences.description: Ride to the top and enjoy the amusement park. Take in the view of the city from the observation deck.

experiences.name: Colònia Güell
experiences.description: Colònia Güell is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The Crypt was built by Gaudi as a place of worship for the people in this manufacturing suburb, under the instruction of entrepreneur Eusebio Güell.

experiences.name: Picasso Museum
experiences.description: Step into the five delightful medieval palaces that house the Picasso Museum, and begin an exploration of the 20th century’s greatest artist. In all, there are over 3,500 works by Picasso; while the collection focuses mainly on his formative creative years, you’ll also see works from throughout his career to get a full sense of this visionary's evolution.

experiences.name: The Dalmases Palace
experiences.description:
The Dalmases Palace is located in the heart of Barcelona and makes for a toe-tapping addition to any night in the city. The venue has been restored to give it a more modern and sophisticated atmosphere without losing the charm of the original construction, which dates back to the 17th century. It's home to traditional tablao flamenco shows by a medley of world-renowned performers.
Flamenco shows take place every day at 18:00, 19:15, 20:15 and 21:15.

experiences.name: Barcelona Locker Rentals
experiences.description:
Are you looking for a convenient and secure place to store your belongings while exploring Barcelona? Look no further! 
These Barcelona locker rental options provide the perfect storage solution for your belongings while you go sightseeing, shopping, and more. 
With easy access, you'll have a safe and secure place to store your important items, so you can enjoy your day without worrying about your belongings.

experiences.name: Mirador Torre Glòries
experiences.description:
The Mirador Torre Glòries (Glories Tower) is an iconic landmark of Barcelona designed by Jean Nouvel and inaugurated in 2007. 
In 2022, Torre Glòries opened a lookout on its 30th floor, becoming the highest viewpoint in the city. The lookout combines art and architecture in an immersive experience that is sure to become one of the city highlights.

experiences.name: White Rabbit Immersive Experience Barcelona
experiences.description: Explore Barcelona's unique culture at White Rabbit. Feel Catalonia's vibrant spirit through 10 different installations, including sculpture, virtual reality, music, video dance, graffiti, an immersive cube, a mechatronic installation, and an infinity room.

experiences.name: Los Tarantos Barcelona
experiences.description:
The Tarantos Flamenco show takes place at Los Tarantos - the oldest flamenco tablao of Barcelona, founded in 1963. 
Located in the city center, close to Las Ramblas, Los Tarantos is at Plaça Reial 17 in the Ciutat Vella quarter of the city. It's close to lots of attractions, bars, and restaurants.

experiences.name: Banksy Museum Barcelona
experiences.description: View famous street art by Banksy and learn about its impact. Attend exhibits showcasing various works and styles.

experiences.name: Wax Museum Barcelona
experiences.description: Just off Las Ramblas, Barcelona’s Wax Museum (Museu de Cera) has more than 150 famous historical characters cast in wax. The museum is tucked into a little alley in a stunning 19th-century Neoclassical building. The museum and its collection were renovated recently, so keep an eye out for the latest figures, like Greta Thunberg!

experiences.name: Catalunya en Miniatura
experiences.description: This miniature park is anything but small! Spanning more than 60,000 square meters, it contains some 147 painstakingly realized models of Catalonia's most iconic buildings – recreated at 1:33 scale. There's also a fully fledged adventure part, allowing intrepid visitors of all ages to leap, slide and swing around the treetop course!

experiences.name: Museu de la Xocolata de Barcelona
experiences.description: You'll find The Chocolate Museum in the former Saint Agustí monastery, located at Carrer Comerç, 36, 08003 Barcelona.
