It was here that, after the destruction of Ayuthaya, King Taksin stumbled upon a small local shrine and interpreted the discovery as an auspicious sign that this should be the site of the new capital of Siam.
Today the temple is one of Bangkok's most iconic structures – not to mention one of the few Buddhist temples you are encouraged to climb on.

experiences.name: Khao Yai National Park
experiences.description: Khao Yai National Park is one of the largest national parks in Thailand and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. It's home to many scenic nature trails, stunning flora and fauna, any many different animal species, from mammals and reptiles to birds and insects. If you’re really lucky, you may just spot a herd of wild elephants. You might also recognise the 150m-tall Haew Narok and 20m-tall Haew Suwat, as seen in the Danny Boyle film 'The Beach.'

experiences.name: Bangkok City Tours
experiences.description: Visit the Grand Palace to see its beautiful architecture. Take a boat ride along the Chao Phraya River to view the city from the water.

experiences.name: Bangkok Airport Transfer
experiences.description:
Looking for a hassle-free way to get to or from Bangkok airport? Look no further than Airport Transfer Bangkok! Expert drivers and top-of-the-line vehicles ensure a comfortable and seamless journey, whether you're heading to your hotel or catching a flight. 
With 24/7 availability and a commitment to punctuality, you can get where you need to go on time, every time. Don't waste time haggling with taxis or navigating public transportation – book your Airport Transfer Bangkok today and enjoy a stress-free start or end to your trip.

experiences.name: Bangkok City Cards
experiences.description:
Get ready to experience the best of Bangkok like a VIP, with City Passes Bangkok! With these all-inclusive passes, you'll feel like a true insider as you gain access to the top attractions, tours, and activities in the city.
Whether you're a history buff, a foodie, or an adventure seeker, our passes offer something for everyone. Take a cooking class to master the art of Thai cuisine, explore historic landmarks on an E-Scooter Tour, ride the Tuk Tuk Hop, and much more!
And the best part? You'll save big with City Passes Bangkok, getting access to over 25 attractions and tours for a fraction of the cost of buying individual tickets. Plus, with all activities available on one convenient app, you'll have everything you need right at your fingertips.

experiences.name: Bangkok Muay Thai Boxing
experiences.description:
Go to a Muay Thai boxing match in Thailand to experience the country's most iconic and traditional sport. 
Matches are filled with intense action and showcase impressive athleticism and skill. It's also a chance to immerse in the local culture and feel the excitement of a live crowd.

experiences.name: Suvarnabhumi Airport
experiences.description: At Suvarnabhumi Airport, you can explore world-class shopping and dine at a variety of restaurants. This modern airport, located in Bangkok, offers convenient facilities, including relaxing lounges and speedy WiFi. It's a perfect place to unwind or get some work done during your travels.

experiences.name: Bangkok Tuk Tuk Tours
experiences.description:
A tuk tuk tour of Bangkok is a great way to quickly see the city's main attractions, like the Grand Palace, Wat Pho, and the night markets. 
You can navigate through narrow streets and busy areas more easily, getting a real feel for the local culture and everyday life.

experiences.name: The JEATH War Museum Kanchanaburi
experiences.description:
The JEATH War Museum in Kanchanaburi, Thailand, offers a poignant glimpse into the harsh realities faced by prisoners of war and forced laborers during the construction of the Thailand-Burma Railway in World War II. 
The museum's name stands for Japan, England, America, Australia, Thailand, and Holland, representing the nationalities of those affected, and features photographs, artifacts, and recreations of wartime living conditions.

experiences.name: Pak Khlong Talat
experiences.description:
Pak Khlong Talat, located in Bangkok, Thailand, is the city’s primary flower market, offering a vibrant and colorful array of flowers, fruits, and vegetables. 
Open 24 hours, this bustling market is particularly lively at night, providing a sensory feast with its fragrant blooms, intricate floral arrangements, and lively atmosphere.

experiences.name: ICONSIAM
experiences.description:
ICONSIAM is a sprawling mixed-use development in Bangkok, Thailand, renowned for its upscale shopping mall, luxury residences, and cultural attractions. 
Situated along the scenic Chao Phraya River, it offers a premier destination for retail, dining, and entertainment, blending state-of-the-art architecture with traditional Thai elements.

experiences.name: River City Bangkok
experiences.description: River City Bangkok is a premier arts and antiques center located along the Chao Phraya River in Thailand's vibrant capital. It offers a diverse range of experiences, including art exhibitions, antique shops, and cultural events, making it a must-visit destination for art enthusiasts and collectors alike.

experiences.name: Vertigo & Moon Bar Rooftop
experiences.description: Immerse yourself in the epitome of opulence at Vertigo, an iconic rooftop dining haven. Offering a celestial dining experience, it pledges an evening that will resonate in your memory. Here, culinary finesse meets the stars, crafting an ambience that exudes class and luxury that is simply unparalleled.

experiences.name: Siam Fantasy
experiences.description: Experience the traditional performances of Thailand and enjoy local cuisine. Participate in interactive cultural activities and learn about the region's history. The show includes classical Thai dances, folk performances from different regions, and live music played on traditional instruments.

experiences.name: Bangkok Walking Tours
experiences.description: Explore the bustling markets and taste local street food. Visit historic temples and learn about their significance.

experiences.name: Sirocco Restaurant
experiences.description:
Sirocco at Lebua offers a high-end dining experience in Bangkok. Known for its rooftop views, excellent Mediterranean-inspired dishes, and refined atmosphere, it's a popular spot for special occasions or a night out.
You can enjoy panoramic views of Bangkok's skyline and the Chao Phraya River from the open-air setting.
The menu offers a range of gourmet dishes made with quality ingredients, highlighting Mediterranean flavors. Furthermore, the stylish setting makes Sirocco ideal for romantic dinners or celebrations.

experiences.name: Pororo Aqua Park Bangkok
experiences.description: Slide down water slides and enjoy the wave pool. Relax in the lazy river and have fun in the kids' play area.

experiences.name: Miracle Lounge Suvarnabhumi Airport
experiences.description: Relax in comfortable seating areas and enjoy complimentary refreshments. Access free WiFi and catch up on work or entertainment.

experiences.name: Ras Al Khaimah Airplane Tours
experiences.description: Fly in a hot air balloon and get a bird's-eye view of the landscape. Ride in a light aircraft for a scenic tour.

experiences.name: Ras Al Khaimah Hot Air Balloon Flights
experiences.description: Float above the desert landscape and view the vast expanse below. Capture photos of the sunrise and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere.

experiences.name: Fujairah Adventures Park
experiences.description: Immerse yourself in the thrill and excitement of Fujairah Adventure Park, the crown jewel of outdoor adventure destinations in Fujairah. This sprawling playground is the epitome of exhilaration, boasting a vast array of adrenaline-pumping activities. Delight in the pure joy of exploration and adventure, as you navigate through the largest outdoor wonderland of its kind. Let your heart race as you embark on the adventure of a lifetime in the heart of Fujairah, where the thrill of the great outdoors awaits. Welcome to Fujairah Adventure Park, your ultimate destination for outdoor fun and frolic.
